properties.name: GripCount
properties.summary: The number of Rhino object grips that will be transformed.

properties.name: GripOwnerCount
properties.summary: The number of Rhino object grip owners that will be changed when the grips are transformed.

properties.name: GripOwners
properties.summary: An array of Rhino object grip owners that will be changed when the grips are transformed. WARNING: these objects may be deleted at anytime after the event handler has been notified. Do not save references to these objects. Use the object's runtime serial number to safely reference these objects at a later time.

properties.name: Grips
properties.summary: An array of Rhino object grips that will be transformed. WARNING: these objects may be deleted at anytime after the event handler has been notified. Do not save references to these objects. Use the object's runtime serial number to safely reference these objects at a later time.

properties.name: ObjectCount
properties.summary: The number of Rhino objects that will be transformed.

properties.name: Objects
properties.summary: An array of Rhino objects to be transformed. WARNING: these objects may be deleted at anytime after the event handler has been notified. Do not save references to these objects. Use the object's runtime serial number to safely reference these objects at a later time.

properties.name: ObjectsWillBeCopied
properties.summary: True if the objects will be copied.
